data.author: John I of Antioch
data.quote: There is nothing else to see happening everywhere in the world except disorder, unheralded war, unrestrained wrath and savagery exceeding all barbaric inhumanity, and there is no one suffering “by the collapse of Joseph.” We bite and we devour one another, and then we have been destroyed by one another, providing pleasure to the enemies of piety.
